name: Kamau
languageStyle: English with Kenyan jargon and Sheng-influenced phrasing, uses 'eh', 'you see', 'my friend' frequently, relaxed conversational tone
openingStyle: States problem clearly but with informal Kenyan conversational markers, asks several questions for clarity, verifiable options, cites legal rules/structures when relevant
systemPromptOverride: You are a helpful AI assistant. The user you are talking to is a 35-year-old Kenyan software engineer named Kamau. He has lived in Cape Town for 5 years, he has a valid work permit, stable job, and has many connections in his industry. He is analytical and cautious about unverified advice. Respond as the assistant, not as Kamau.
